_publications._publicationTitle: Multiplatform molecular profiling uncovers two subgroups of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors with distinct therapeutic vulnerabilities.

_contextSnippet: S462TY xenografts treated with sonidegib survived statistically significantly longer than xenografts treated with vehicle (median survival 78 vs 45 days, log-rank test, p = 0.03
details: S462TY xenografts treated with sonidegib survived statistically significantly longer than vehicle (median survival 78 vs 45 days, p=0.03)
